
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick all objects with white parts and place them on the floor

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From my current view, I need to identify objects with white parts. I can see several objects, but I need to get a better look at some of them to verify their colors. Let me first move to a position that gives me a clearer view of the objects on the table.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Walk`

```json
{
  "x": 0.5,
  "y": 1.0,
  "z": 0.0
}
```

</details>

</details>

</details>

<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**

```json
{
  "x": 1.0,
  "y": 0.7,
  "z": 0.5
}
```

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From this view, I can see several objects and I notice object 20 and 23 which appear to have white parts. Let me start with picking up object 23.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "23"
}
```

```json
  "x": 2.1,
  "y": 0.1,
  "z": 0.3
}
```

- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": 1.5,
  "y": 0.7,
  "z": 0.5
}
```

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have now completed the task of moving all objects with white parts to the floor. In total, I found and moved three objects \(20, 23, and 34\) that had white components. They are now all placed on the floor near each other. After my final scan of the environment, I don't see any other objects with white parts that need to be moved.
